title: Only one with Build_02-Build_05 sequenced operator guides
public_claim: Red Team execution-ready archive is an operator-guide packet for sequenced Build 02 through Build 05 work.
distinctive_mechanism: It carries standalone build sheets, PASS-state language, Red Team Lab sequencing, and operator guides so implementation can be resumed without losing order, dependencies, or validation intent.
use_value: It matters because adversarial-review rooms fail when build state is lost; this packet keeps the implementation path replayable.
